name: Loom MCP
description: AST-aware code-context compiler. Symbol-level retrieval, semantic search, and impact analysis over a local code index.

envVars.name: LOOM_WORKSPACE
envVars.description: Workspace root directory to index. Defaults to the current working directory.

args.name: max-topology-depth
args.description: Cap traversal depth when computing topology.

args.name: focus-budget
args.description: Maximum number of files held in the active focus buffer.
